scripts.test:ui:allure: sh -c "allure generate tests/ui/artifacts/allure-results --clean -o tests/ui/artifacts/allure-report || allure generate artifacts/allure-results --clean -o tests/ui/artifacts/allure-report || (echo '[warn] allure generate skipped; java not available' && mkdir -p tests/ui/artifacts/allure-report && (cp -r tests/ui/artifacts/allure-results tests/ui/artifacts/allure-report/allure-results || cp -r artifacts/allure-results tests/ui/artifacts/allure-report/allure-results || true))"
scripts.test:ui:ci: sh -c 'set +e; npm run test:ui; test_exit=$?; npm run test:ui:coverage; coverage_exit=$?; npm run test:ui:allure; allure_exit=$?; if [ $test_exit -ne 0 ]; then exit $test_exit; fi; if [ $coverage_exit -ne 0 ]; then exit $coverage_exit; fi; exit $allure_exit'
